title: Review
description: Review the full implementation for correctness, security, and spec compliance. Check: defusedxml is used everywhere XML is parsed in pack.py and clean.py; xml.etree.ElementTree is never used for writing; atomic writes are correct; pptx_edit context manager does not repack on exception; 1-based/0-based index boundary is handled consistently; JSON output is always valid; --plain never leaks JSON; all exit codes are correct; test coverage is adequate.
acceptance_criteria: `defusedxml` is used for all XML parsing in `pack.py` and `clean.py`; `xml.etree.ElementTree` is not imported in those modules.
`pack()` uses temp-file-then-rename atomicity; `pptx_edit` does not repack on exception.
All CLI commands exit with code 0 on success and non-zero on failure with errors on stderr.
1-based index conversion is applied consistently at every CLI/ops boundary.
No `json.loads` is called on untrusted input without error handling.
Test coverage spans all ops functions and all CLI commands including error paths.
No spec requirements are missing from the implementation.
